label: This is not my document
description: User indicates the document does not belong to them.

label: I already replaced this document
description: The matched document has been replaced and is no longer valid (probably an old document).

label: Claim created
description: Applied automatically to a match when associated claim is created.

label: Invalid document
description: Submitted document is invalid or unacceptable.

label: Incomplete documentation
description: Required supporting documents were missing.

label: Incorrect information
description: Submitted information does not match official records.

label: Not eligible
description: Claimant does not meet eligibility requirements.

label: Policy violation
description: Claim violates defined policy or operational guidelines.

label: Policy violation
description: Claim violates defined policy or operational guidelines.

label: Fraud suspected
description: Suspicion of fraudulent activity during review.

label: Fraud suspected
description: Suspicion of fraudulent activity during review.

label: Fraud confirmed
description: Fraud was confirmed after investigation.

label: Fraud confirmed
description: Fraud was confirmed after investigation.

label: New evidence invalidates claim
description: New evidence invalidates a previously verified claim.

label: Documents validated
description: Claim documents and information were reviewed and confirmed valid.

label: Dispute resolved in favor
description: A previously rejected claim was reinstated after dispute review.

label: Invalid submission
description: Claimant submitted claim with invalid attachment or information.

label: I withdraw dispute
description: Claimant submitted claim with invalid attachment or information.

label: Request for verification review
description: Claimant requested for verification review when their claim was rejected

label: Claimant requested verification review
description: Claimant requested for verification review when their claim was rejected

label: Documents validated
description: All submitted documents were reviewed and confirmed valid.

label: Additional evidence accepted
description: New evidence submitted during dispute resolved previous concerns.

label: Dispute resolved in favor
description: Dispute review concluded in favor of the claimant.

label: Previous decision overturned
description: A prior rejection was overturned after review.

label: Insufficient evidence
description: Submitted evidence was not sufficient to verify ownership.

label: Inconsistent information
description: Provided information does not match official records.

label: Eligibility requirements not met
description: Claimant does not meet the necessary eligibility criteria.

label: Fraud confirmed
description: Fraudulent activity was confirmed during review.

label: Policy violation
description: Claim violates operational or regulatory policy.

label: Fraud suspected
description: Suspicion of fraudulent activity during review.

label: Owner reported lost document
description: Owner reported lost document

label: Staff confirmed collection
description: Staff confirmed collection of found document from finder

label: verifier received and verified found document from finder
description: verifier received and verified found document from finder

label: Inauthentic Document
description: Counterfeit Document

label: Non-Original Submission
description: Counterfeit Document

label: Other
description: Other reason not list in the reasons

label: Scheduling conflict
description: The claimant has a conflict on the scheduled handover date.

label: Changed handover method
description: The claimant wishes to switch between pickup and delivery.

label: Location not convenient
description: The selected pickup station is too far or inconvenient for the claimant.

label: Other
description: Other reason not listed.

label: Submitted for approval
description: Staff submitted operation for supervisor approval.

label: Approved
description: Supervisor approved the operation for execution.

label: Executed
description: Operation was executed and custody transitions applied to all items.

label: Incorrect destination
description: Transfer targets the wrong or unexpected station.

label: Case status mismatch
description: One or more found cases are not in a valid state for this operation.

label: Duplicate operation
description: A similar operation already exists or is currently in progress.

label: Incomplete documentation
description: Required notes or supporting information is missing.

label: Policy violation
description: Violates custody policy (e.g., attempting to dispose a document with active claims).

label: Document claimed
description: The document owner claimed the document before the operation completed.

label: Station unavailable
description: The destination station is temporarily closed or unreachable.

label: Created in error
description: Operation was created by mistake.

label: Duplicate operation
description: This operation is superseded by another.

label: Circumstances changed
description: Conditions changed (e.g., document found damaged, case voided).
